name: Lease Violation Notice
description: Ops stages lease-violation evidence, cure-path recommendations, notice drafts, and escalation tracking with human/legal approval before resident-facing notices or enforcement action.

stages.name: Normalize Violation Intake
stages.description: Normalize reported violation facts and evidence before drafting a path.

steps.title: Normalize violation facts
steps.instructions: Normalize property, unit, tenant, reporter, allegation, lease clause if known, evidence, photos, dates, prior notices, open work orders, owner concerns, and source confidence. Missing lease, evidence, or AppFolio data must be null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize violation facts and missing-data flags. No resident sends, owner sends, enforcement action, or AppFolio write.

steps.title: Review evidence sufficiency
steps.instructions: Review whether evidence is sufficient, whether more photos or documentation are needed, and whether the issue is maintenance, resident conduct, owner concern, or no-action.
steps.human_prompt: Review lease violation evidence before cure path or notice drafting.

stages.name: Draft Cure Path
stages.description: Draft internal cure, investigation, or no-action paths.

steps.title: Draft cure path recommendation
steps.instructions: Draft internal recommendation: request more evidence, maintenance follow-up, informal reminder, formal cure notice, owner decision, attorney review, monitor-only, or no action. Draft-only; do not contact anyone.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft internal lease violation cure path. No resident, owner, vendor, or attorney sends.

steps.title: Draft violation notice
steps.instructions: If formal notice is recommended, draft notice language and cure requirements for legal/human review only. Do not send, post, serve, or imply notice delivery.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft violation notice for review only. No resident send or service.

steps.title: Review cure path and notice
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, hold, or reject cure path and notice language before any resident-facing action, owner update, attorney handoff, or enforcement step.
steps.human_prompt: Human/legal approval required before any lease violation notice or enforcement action.

stages.name: Stage Approved Action
stages.description: Stage approved notice or investigation packets without releasing them.

steps.title: Stage approved violation action
steps.instructions: Stage approved action metadata, notice draft, evidence packet, cure deadline, owner update draft, and delivery proof checklist for operator release. Do not send notices, contact owners, contact residents, serve documents, or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved violation action metadata only. No external sends, service, or AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Prepare cure tracking checklist
steps.instructions: Prepare cure tracking checklist, evidence follow-up fields, inspection/work-order refs, and deadline checkpoints. Do not create work orders or contact vendors/residents.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare cure tracking checklist. No work-order creation and no external sends.

stages.name: Track Cure And Closeout
stages.description: Track cure status and escalation needs after approved action happens outside automation.

steps.title: Track cure status
steps.instructions: Track cured, not cured, needs inspection, needs maintenance, owner decision needed, attorney review needed, or needs_verification with source and timestamp. Do not escalate automatically.
steps.dispatch_body: Track cure status metadata. No external sends and no escalation action.

steps.title: Record violation closeout
steps.instructions: Record final status, evidence refs, unresolved blockers, owner update needs, and any human-approved escalation handoff. Do not write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Record internal lease violation closeout. No AppFolio write and no external send.
